mapper.select:
SELECT v.id, u.full_name AS studentName, COALESCE(u.student_no, u.employee_no) AS studentId, COALESCE(sr.display_name, sr.room_name) AS roomName, s.seat_code AS seatNo, DATE_FORMAT(v.occurred_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, DATE_FORMAT(v.occurred_at, '%H:%i') AS time, v.description_text AS reason, u.violation_count AS count, v.created_at AS createdAt FROM violations v JOIN users u ON u.id = v.user_id JOIN reservations r ON r.id = v.reservation_id JOIN study_rooms sr ON sr.id = r.study_room_id JOIN seats s ON s.id = r.seat_id
(u.full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR u.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
ORDER BY v.created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS uniqueStudents, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE account_status = 'suspended' AND deleted_at IS NULL) AS suspendedStudents, SUM(CASE WHEN occurred_at >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS newThisMonth FROM violations WHERE violation_status = 'active'

SELECT v.id, u.full_name AS studentName, COALESCE(u.student_no, u.employee_no) AS studentId, COALESCE(sr.display_name, sr.room_name) AS roomName, s.seat_code AS seatNo, DATE_FORMAT(v.occurred_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, DATE_FORMAT(v.occurred_at, '%H:%i') AS time, v.description_text AS reason, u.violation_count AS count, v.created_at AS createdAt FROM violations v JOIN users u ON u.id = v.user_id JOIN reservations r ON r.id = v.reservation_id JOIN study_rooms sr ON sr.id = r.study_room_id JOIN seats s ON s.id = r.seat_id WHERE v.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY v.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM violations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND violation_status = 'active'
